channel.title: DDoS on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in DDoS on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Defending consumer web properties against modern DDoS attacks
item.description:
Microsoft published guidance on defending consumer web properties against modern DDoS attacks, emphasizing layered security, resilient architecture, and graceful service degradation.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft HTTP DDoS Ruleset for Azure WAF on Azure Front Door Premium
item.description:
Microsoft has announced public preview of the HTTP DDoS Ruleset for Azure WAF on Azure Front Door Premium. The feature is intended to help protect against HTTP-layer DDoS attacks, which can bypass traditional static controls.

  • Source: Azure Updates
